title: Halo Skin Totem
description: Change the totem to your own skin.
body:
**I want to contribute to an open-source project. However, the project is practically abandoned. The license is LGPL-3.0. Someday, I’ll come back with another project.**

I would like to express my gratitude to those who have used my project. :)

Change the totem to your own skin.

1, The path is "pack/assets/minecraft/textures/item" here.

2, This way, you can change the skin and Halo,Heart color.

2.1, The name should be the same as "totem.png" as this one here.

2.2, If you're not sure, check out the gallery for a more detailed explanation

There are Steve versions and Alex versions.
